tasks.label: Build WAR (Use VSCode Tomcat Plugin)
args: if (Test-Path "${workspaceFolder}\software-code\build") { Remove-Item -Path "${workspaceFolder}\software-code\build" -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path "${workspaceFolder}\software-code\target") { Remove-Item -Path "${workspaceFolder}\software-code\target" -Recurse -Force }; & "${workspaceFolder}\software-code\build-no-maven.ps1"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Write-Host "WAR built: ${workspaceFolder}\software-code\build\java-web-json.war"; Write-Host "Next: deploy/run this WAR from VSCode Tomcat plugin."
